response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong technical expertise across multiple domains and some exposure to developer tools and infrastructure, he lacks the critical 2 years of people management experience explicitly required for this mid-to-senior management role. The resume shows no evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or team development. Though teaching workshops and community involvement suggest communication skills, these don't substitute for actual people leadership in a management position.
strengths: 20 years of diverse software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with demonstrated technical depth
Relevant exposure to developer tools, testing frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and CI/CD infrastructure (GitLab, Docker, artifactory)
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through multiple workshops, talks, and open-source community contributions
concerns: Complete absence of people management experience—no manager titles, no evidence of managing reports, conducting performance reviews, or developing team members
Developer tools experience is scattered across multiple roles and projects rather than consolidated into a clear 3-year professional focus
Limited mobile platform expertise (only 1 year of iOS work in 2015-2016), while the role emphasizes leading engineering productivity across a major mobile platform ecosystem
